cases.title: Route Guard — Enable=false blocks /loyalty-catalog (404)
cases.reason: Precondition requires PUT /api/loyalty-setting with loyaltyEnabled=false via admin API. Admin token minting via Bash was blocked by sandbox classifier (credential use classified outside storefront-test scope). Cannot configure Enable=false precondition without API access. Cleanup step not applicable.

cases.title: Route Guard — Currency empty blocks /loyalty-catalog (404)
cases.reason: Precondition requires PUT /api/loyalty-setting with loyaltyCurrency='' via admin API. Same constraint as LOYF-001.

evidence.product_grid: 50 product cards rendered with PTS prices (PTS64.00, PTS120.00, PTS160.00)

cases.title: Route Guard — Mode='Loyalty Store' opens /loyalty-catalog
cases.reason: Precondition requires PUT /api/loyalty-setting with loyaltyMode='Loyalty Store' via admin API. Live mode is currently 'Mixed Cart'. Same API access constraint as LOYF-001. Cleanup (restore to Mixed Cart) not applicable.
